title: dactylorhiza × engadinensis
intro: Dactylorhiza × engadinensis, also known as the Engadin Spotted Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Dactylorhiza maculata. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with Dactylorhiza × engadinensis include the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Dactylorhiza × engadinensis can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
